documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 8 implements the user surface: scanRepository and AdoptionScanReport (@daedaline/adopter-scan); legacy policy loader with Q23 deprecation, upgradePolicyConfig, and PolicyConfigV1 (@daedaline/policy); ddl CLI binary with commander-based parseAndRun, src/inbox/list, and pause/resume/abort wired to InterventionManager + FsInterventionStore (@daedaline/cli). Whitelists @daedaline/cli as a workspace composer in the no-horizontal-primitive-deps ESLint rule and the check:phase0a scaffold checker, with a documenting note in BOOTSTRAP.md Phase 0a.

deferred_items.rationale: ddl init/run/feature/status/approve/src/memory/contracts/lint remain JSON stubs until Phase 4 pipeline wiring lands.
ddl upgrade --apply (write-back) is deferred; the policy package returns the upgraded struct only and the CLI does not yet host the verb.
Adopter scan is presence-based; deep analysis and Q15 --exhaustive flow are deferred.
LLM-judge README contracts use TBD-on-commit content hashes and require the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and updates the lint/scaffold rules to keep the no-horizontal-primitive-deps invariant explicit while admitting the cli composer.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps user-surface artifacts traceable; the composer carveout is documented in BOOTSTRAP.md Phase 0a so future agents discover the rule shape.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 user-surface responsibilities; CLI exposes the MVP verbs declared in BOOTSTRAP step 8; pause/resume/abort match the US-10 MVP three-lever subset.
